endpoints.name: View the List of DTCs for specific vehicleId.
endpoints.description: This API creates a readout of DTCs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VEHICLEID}} with a real vehicleid.

endpoints.name: View the List of DTC Snapshot for specific vehicleId.
endpoints.description: This API creates a readout of a DTC snapshot from one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the DTC snapshot readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ECUID}} with a real ecuid. Replace {{DTCID}} with a real dtcid. Replace {{VEHICLEID}} with a real vehicleid.

endpoints.name: View the List of ECU for specific vehicleId.
endpoints.description: This API creates a readout of ECUs for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the ECU readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VEHICLEID}} with a real vehicleid.

endpoints.name: View the List of resources
endpoints.description: This API creates a readout of available resources to the accessing party for one vehicle. If the result is available immediately, the result is returned. If the result isn't available, a location to the resource readout is returned. This location shall be polled until the result is available. INFO: GET Requests are not yet supported!
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VEHICLEID}} with a real vehicleid.
